summary: E042: Local Places Integration - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Google Places API integration returns real dog parks, pet stores, vets, and groomers for cities worldwide (Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad tested).

backend_api_tests.test_local_places_default_city: PASS - Mumbai returns all 4 place types

frontend_ui_tests.local_places_section_visible: PASS - Section visible on Enjoy page
frontend_ui_tests.quick_city_picks: PASS - Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Goa buttons work
frontend_ui_tests.dog_parks_tab: PASS - Shows dog parks with correct data
frontend_ui_tests.pet_stores_tab: PASS - Shows pet stores with correct data
frontend_ui_tests.vets_tab: PASS - Shows veterinary clinics with 24 Hours badges
frontend_ui_tests.groomers_tab: PASS - Shows groomers with correct data
frontend_ui_tests.place_cards: PASS - Display name, address, rating, reviews count, status badges
frontend_ui_tests.phone_button: PASS - Visible for places with phone numbers
frontend_ui_tests.website_button: PASS - Visible for places with websites
frontend_ui_tests.show_more_button: PASS - Expands to show more places
frontend_ui_tests.concierge_cta: PASS - 'Let Concierge® help you' link visible

api_endpoints_verified: /api/mira/local-places (GET) - Main endpoint for all place types

test_credentials.note: No authentication required for local places APIs

seed_data_creation: None - Uses live Google Places API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: E042 Local Places Integration is fully functional. The feature uses Google Places API (not Foursquare) to search for dog parks, pet stores, veterinary clinics, and groomers worldwide. LocalPlacesSection component is integrated on the Enjoy page at the bottom. All data-testid attributes are present for UI automation.
features_verified: Backend: /api/mira/local-places returns all place types (dog_parks, pet_stores, vets, groomers)
Backend: Emergency vet search parameter works
Backend: City parameter works for Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Kolkata
Frontend: LocalPlacesSection visible on Enjoy page
Frontend: City search input and search button functional
Frontend: Quick city picks (Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, etc.) work
Frontend: Tabs for Dog Parks, Pet Stores, Veterinary Clinics, Pet Groomers work
Frontend: Place cards show name, address, rating, review count, open/closed status
Frontend: Directions button opens Google Maps
Frontend: Phone and Website buttons visible when available
Frontend: Show More button expands results
